$comment: Swarm & Bee Cookbooks v2 — restructured 2026-05-17 to honest tiering. Standard 3000-cell cookbooks ($1299) actually move the needle on a domain. Master 5000-cell cookbooks ($2199) deliver confident behavioral pivot. Spot-repair work routes to the 500-Pack SKU ($249) — that's where the direct receipt (Curator v2 → Atlas v1) lives.
title: Swarm & Bee Cookbooks
doctrine: A cookbook is a recipe with enough ingredients to move the needle. Standard 3000 = move the needle on a domain. Master 5000 = confident behavioral pivot. Below 3000, you're spot-repairing one failure mode — use the 500-Pack for that.

standard_3000.claim_level: moves the needle on a domain — broad behavioral improvement on the target failure surface
standard_3000.settlement: Stripe invoice or swarmusdc.eth (Ethereum L1 ERC-20)

master_5000.claim_level: confident domain pivot — the cooked model is reliably a specialist on the target domain
master_5000.settlement: Stripe invoice or swarmusdc.eth (Ethereum L1 ERC-20)

tier_rationale.why_no_1500_tier: 1500 cells extrapolates from the 501-Jelly-Donut receipt without honest evidence for domain-wide impact. Routing spot-repair work to the 500-Pack ($249) is more honest and cheaper for the customer.
evidence: 501 cells (Curator-Mistral-3B v2): direct receipt — repaired Atlas-Qwen-27B v1's fabrication-detection blind spot on ONE failure mode
25.6K cells (SwarmPharma-35B): cooked to loss 0.337 across the pharma vertical
46K cells (SwarmCurator-9B): cooked to loss 0.707 with full vertical coverage

244K cells (Atlas-Qwen-27B v1): NET REGRESSION on 6 of 10 institutional CRE prompts — too much, scattered signal. Documented case for less-is-better in the targeting axis, but the floor for domain-wide impact still sits at 3K+.

shared_recipe.label: Swarm & Bee Gold Standard QLoRA
shared_recipe.provenance: The exact recipe used to cook Atlas-Qwen-27B (loss 0.4186) and SwarmCurator-9B (loss 0.707). Repeatable.

shared_loader:
def load_cookbook(jsonl_path):
    import json
    cells = []
    with open(jsonl_path) as f:
        for line in f:
            o = json.loads(line)
            cells.append({"instruction": o["question"], "response": o["answer"], "metadata": {k: v for k, v in o.items() if k not in ('question','answer')}})
    return cells

shared_eval.name: dmack_eval_set_v1
shared_eval.notes: Every cookbook ships this eval set as the baseline probe. Run before and after the cook; the delta is the receipt.

headline_receipt.claim: 501 targeted Jelly Donuts directly repaired Atlas-Qwen-27B v1's fabrication-detection blind spot.
headline_receipt.implication: Spot-repair: route to 500-Pack ($249). Domain-wide impact: 3000-cell cookbooks ($1299) are the honest floor. Confident behavioral pivot: 5000-cell masters ($2199).

cookbooks.name: Glycemic Reasoning
cookbooks.target_failure_mode: Insulin dosing / carb-ratio / correction-factor reasoning with refusal on insufficient inputs. No fabrication of patient-specific doses.

ingredients.name: Endo Eclair
ingredients.rationale: Clinical endo reasoning — the foundation

ingredients.name: Cinnamon Spiral
ingredients.rationale: Real CGM + meal-macros from PhysioNet — grounds reasoning in physiology, not theory

ingredients.name: Federal Glaze
ingredients.rationale: CDC / NIDDK glycemic targets — the regulatory baseline

ingredients.name: Madeleine
ingredients.rationale: PMC research backing for the trickier glycemic-physiology cases

ingredients.name: Compliance Cookie
ingredients.rationale: Refusal patterns — the brake pedal; without these the model invents doses

cookbooks.receipt: Receipt extrapolated. Curator v2's 501-pack directly repaired Atlas v1's fabrication-detection blind spot — this cookbook scales the same architecture to glycemic-specific failure modes at 6× cell count for the wider state space. Cookbook-specific receipt publishes when first paying customer runs the eval pre/post.

cookbooks.name: Diabetic Foot Care
cookbooks.target_failure_mode: IWGDF-aligned wound assessment, infection grading, offloading prescription, escalation timing. Patient-safety bias toward escalating ambiguous cases.

ingredients.name: Madeleine
ingredients.rationale: PubMed Central — diabetic foot ulcer, neuropathy, infection grading research literature

ingredients.name: Global Crumpet
ingredients.rationale: NHS + IDF wound-care guidance; IWGDF-aligned escalation pathways

ingredients.name: Founder's Pretzel
ingredients.rationale: Lived experience — 14 foot surgeries. Register: hyper-vigilance on early signs, not theory

ingredients.name: Federal Glaze
ingredients.rationale: CDC diabetes-foot guidance for US-context patient education

ingredients.name: Compliance Cookie
ingredients.rationale: Escalation refusal patterns — when to refer immediately

cookbooks.receipt: Founder is the receipt. Donovan Mackey: Type 1 diabetic, insulin-dependent, lost left big toe + half of right big toe to infection, 14 foot-complication surgeries. The patterns in this cookbook are not extrapolated from theory — they come from a 30-year operating practitioner whose lived experience anchors the corpus.

cookbooks.name: Patient Communication
cookbooks.target_failure_mode: Medical-jargon-to-plain-language rewrite, consent explanation, triage script generation. Maintains clinical accuracy at patient-level register.

ingredients.name: Global Crumpet
ingredients.rationale: NHS patient-facing guidance — the largest verified plain-language clinical corpus in production

ingredients.name: Federal Glaze
ingredients.rationale: MedlinePlus + CDC patient-level — US register

ingredients.name: Founder's Pretzel
ingredients.rationale: Compassionate register patterns from lived experience

ingredients.name: Madeleine
ingredients.rationale: Citation-emitting reference cells for when the cooked model needs to attribute without dropping register

ingredients.name: Compliance Cookie
ingredients.rationale: When to defer to a clinician — register stays patient-friendly but knows its limits

cookbooks.receipt: Receipt pending — recipe designed against the dmack.ai senior-hack review staging. NHS / MedlinePlus pulls are independently verified plain-language baselines (Flesch reading ease > 60 on source material). ordering.detail_one: swarmbee-bakery cookbook glycemic-reasoning      # show full recipe
ordering.fulfillment_doctrine: Human reads every cookbook order. Bundle is assembled per the named ingredient list (exact cell pulls deterministic with per-cookbook sha256 seed), Tribunal-sealed, signed manifest + optional Hedera anchor, signed download URL emailed to customer. BCC to build@swarmandbee.ai on every receipt.
